chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Cr. Misc. Application No. S- 286 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection-A. 2. For hearing of bail application. 21.02.2025. Mr. Ashfaque Hussain Abro, Advocate for the Applicant. Mr. Aitbar Ali Bullo, Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh ------------ Learned Counsel for applicant under instructions does not press instant Cr. Misc. Application, which is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E
